name: useDebounce
description: A hook that creates a debounced version of a function using lodash debounce, useful for optimizing expensive operations.
usage_guidelines: Use for search inputs to reduce API calls.
Apply to resize/scroll handlers for performance.
Use for form validation that triggers on input.
Set appropriate wait time based on use case.
Consider leading option for immediate first call.

params.name: wait
params.description: Milliseconds to wait before invoking function.

return_value.description: Debounced version of the function with cancel and flush methods.

Dont: Don't use for critical immediate actions
Don't set wait time too long
Don't forget to cancel on unmount
